ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polygons" (
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polygon */,
  "wkt" TEXT /* Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the polygon */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the polygon */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the polygon data (e.g., Shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the polygon data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the polygon was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the polygon was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., string, integer, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_attributes_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "polygon1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first polygon in the relationship */,
  "polygon2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second polygon in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of spatial relationship (e.g., intersects, contains) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two polygons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_relationships_polygon2_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon2_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_relationships_polygon1_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon1_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the polygon */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the polygon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "new_wkt" TEXT /* New WKT representation of the polygon after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_history_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of spatial analysis (e.g., intersection, buffering) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the analysis in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_analysis_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon being indexed */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of spatial index (e.g., R-tree, quadtree) */,
  "index_value" TEXT /* Value of the index */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_index_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being imported (e.g., Shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being exported (e.g., Shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "data_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the data being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_metadata_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "polygon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygon */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_tags_polygon_id FOREIGN KEY ("polygon_id") REFERENCES polygons ("polygon_id")
)
